authentication.description: Obtain JWT authentication token for subsequent API requests

ApiLogin.description: API login configured in iikoWeb dashboard

Token.description: JWT bearer token for Authorization header

authentication.notes: Token must be refreshed before expiry. SDKs handle automatic refresh. All subsequent requests must include Authorization header.

endpoints.name: List Organizations
endpoints.description: Returns all organizations (brands/restaurants) available to authenticated API user
endpoints.usedFor: Load organization/brand/restaurant structure for dashboard drill-down (Level 1: Company -> Brand -> Restaurant)
endpoints.notes: Essential for multi-location setup. Returns parent-child relationships between brands and restaurants.

endpoints.name: Get Financial Snapshots
endpoints.description: Retrieve aggregated revenue data by payment type per restaurant per day

reportType.description: SALES = revenue by dish; TRANSACTIONS = financial operations

filters.description: Filter by paymentType, date range, etc.

endpoints.usedFor: Populate FinancialSnapshot (every 15 min): revenue by payment type (cash, Kaspi, Halyk, Yandex, card) per restaurant
endpoints.notes: Flexible OLAP engine allows custom grouping. Supports date range queries. May require pagination for large result sets.

endpoints.name: Get Receipts / Check Items
endpoints.description: Retrieve detailed receipt/check data including items, quantities, prices, payment methods
endpoints.usedFor: Validate revenue data, drill into individual transactions, audit payment accuracy
endpoints.notes: Pagination required. May be computationally expensive for large date ranges.

endpoints.name: Get Payment Types
endpoints.description: Returns list of payment method types available in iiko (cash, card, Kaspi, Halyk, Yandex, etc.)

organizationId.description: Organization to get payment types for

endpoints.usedFor: Classify revenue by payment type in FinancialSnapshot (cash, Kaspi, Halyk, Yandex, card)
endpoints.notes: Essential reference data. Maps payment method IDs to dashboard display names.

endpoints.name: Get Nomenclature / Menu Items
endpoints.description: Returns restaurant menu structure: categories, items, prices. Includes DDS article mappings.
endpoints.usedFor: Map DDS expense articles to menu items. Identify which dishes incur which direct costs.
endpoints.notes: DDS article structure may vary by organization. Used to link expenses to products.

endpoints.name: Get DDS Expenses
endpoints.description: Retrieve Direct Delivery System (DDS) expenses by article, restaurant, date. Restaurant-level operating expenses.
endpoints.usedFor: Populate Expense(IIKO) table: direct operating expenses by article (DDS). Critical for restaurant P&L.
endpoints.notes: DDS = restaurant's own inventory/supply expenses. Different from kitchen purchases (from 1C). Aggregated at drill-down level 3 (restaurant).

endpoints.name: Get DDS Article Groups
endpoints.description: Returns DDS article category structure (e.g., 'Utilities', 'Labor', 'Supplies'). Used for expense classification.
endpoints.usedFor: Categorize DDS expenses into logical groups for reporting and drill-down (Level 4: Article).
endpoints.notes: Enables hierarchical expense classification. May have restaurant overrides.

endpoints.name: Get Kitchen Shipments
endpoints.description: Retrieve internal kitchen transfers from central production kitchen to restaurant locations
endpoints.usedFor: Track KitchenShipment table: internal inter-restaurant transfers. Used in cost allocation calculations.
endpoints.notes: Distinguishes between restaurant's own inventory vs. transferred items from central kitchen. Impacts cost allocation.

endpoints.name: Get Cash Discrepancies
endpoints.description: Retrieve shift-end cash register reconciliation: expected vs. actual cash balance, discrepancies
endpoints.usedFor: Populate CashDiscrepancy table: track cash register accuracy at shift close. Used for audit and anomaly detection.
endpoints.notes: Critical for cash flow reconciliation. Flags shifts with unusual discrepancies for investigation.

endpoints.name: Get Shift Information
endpoints.description: Retrieve shift open/close times, status, cash counts
endpoints.usedFor: Correlate shift timing with financial snapshots. Link transactions to specific shifts.
endpoints.notes: Supports drilling into specific shift data for audit purposes.

endpoints.name: Get Employees / Couriers
endpoints.description: Returns list of delivery couriers and their status
endpoints.usedFor: Reference: support multi-channel analytics (if delivery data is tracked)
endpoints.notes: Not immediately required for MVP; included for completeness.

endpoints.name: Get Cities / Regions
endpoints.description: Returns geographic reference data (cities, regions for Kazakhstan)
endpoints.usedFor: Geographic filtering/reporting (optional)
endpoints.notes: Static reference data, rarely changes.

endpoints.name: Get Discounts
endpoints.description: Returns available discount types and rules
endpoints.usedFor: Audit: verify revenue calculations account for discounts
endpoints.notes: Used to reconcile net revenue vs. gross sales.

endpoints.name: Get Removal Types / Cancellation Causes
endpoints.description: Returns reasons for order cancellations/removals
endpoints.usedFor: Track reasons for revenue adjustments/cancellations
endpoints.notes: Helps identify if revenue deletions are valid (accidental orders, errors, etc.)

endpoints.name: Get Stop Lists
endpoints.description: Returns out-of-stock items (stopped items not available for sale)
endpoints.usedFor: Contextual analysis: understand unavailable items during a period
endpoints.notes: Used to explain revenue anomalies.

endpoints.name: Get Tips Types
endpoints.description: Returns tip categories and types
endpoints.usedFor: Separate tips from core revenue (if tracked)
endpoints.notes: May not be significant for KEX GROUP; included for completeness.

endpoints.name: Create Order
endpoints.description: Create a new table order (POS integration)
endpoints.usedFor: NOT USED FOR KEX GROUP - iiko is read-only for aggregation
endpoints.notes: Order creation is managed within iiko POS. KEX GROUP reads data only.

endpoints.name: Get Delivery Order Types
endpoints.description: Returns available delivery order type configurations
endpoints.usedFor: Reference data (if delivery analytics are needed later)
endpoints.notes: KEX GROUP may not use delivery data initially; included for future expansion.

endpoints.name: Terminal Groups Is Alive
endpoints.description: Check health/availability of POS terminal groups
endpoints.usedFor: Data freshness validation: confirm terminals are actively syncing
endpoints.notes: Used by aggregator to detect data gaps or missing restaurants.

endpoints.name: Send Notifications (Webhook)
endpoints.description: Setup webhook subscriptions for real-time events (orders, deliveries, etc.)
endpoints.usedFor: Optional: Real-time event streaming instead of polling. Not required for MVP.
endpoints.notes: Alternative to polling-based aggregation. Consider for Phase 2 optimization.

webhooks.description: Fired when a new order is created in iiko
Fired when delivery order status changes
Fired when shift ends with cash mismatch
Fired when menu items are stopped/unstoppable

limitations.description: Most polling endpoints are limited to query windows of ~15-30 days; aggregate-worker must use windowing strategy for historical data
Large result sets require pagination with offset/limit parameters
Tokens expire after 1 hour; refresh required. SDKs handle automatically.
Complex OLAP reports may require several seconds; asynchronous polling may be needed
Data is eventually consistent. Polling frequency (15 min, 30 min, 1 hr) introduces latency.
API base URL is api-ru.iiko.services (Russian region); latency for Kazakhstan may be ~200-500ms

recommendations.reason: These provide complete P&L for all 4 drill-down levels

recommendations.action: Cache reference data (organizations, payment_types, articles) with 24-hour TTL
recommendations.reason: Reference data changes rarely; reduces API calls significantly

recommendations.action: Implement exponential backoff + circuit breaker for rate limit handling
recommendations.reason: API may throttle during high-load periods

recommendations.action: Add kitchen_shipments and terminal_groups_is_alive for data freshness checks
recommendations.reason: Helps explain cost allocation anomalies and detect missing data

recommendations.action: Evaluate webhook subscriptions for real-time event streaming
recommendations.reason: Reduce latency in financial dashboards; eliminate polling overhead

recommendations.action: Implement historical data sync for first-time setup
recommendations.reason: Backfill 6-12 months of data; use windowed queries (15-30 day windows) to stay within rate limits

syncSteps.purpose: Obtain JWT token for subsequent calls
Revenue by payment type, restaurant, date
DDS expenses by article, restaurant, date
Distribute HQ expenses (1C) by revenue coefficient

aggregatorWorker.errorHandling: Retry with exponential backoff; log to Sentry; skip step if timeout (data will sync on next cycle)

costAllocationIntegration.description: Cost Allocation Engine combines iiko DDS + 1C HQ expenses

inputs.description: Corporate overhead (rent, IT, legal, marketing) not tied to specific restaurant

algorithm.step1: Calculate total revenue per restaurant (from FinancialSnapshot)
algorithm.step2: Calculate total revenue (sum of all restaurants)
algorithm.step3: For each HQ expense item, calculate distribution coefficient: restaurant_revenue / total_revenue
algorithm.step5: Store allocated amounts in Expense(1C_ALLOCATED) table

costAllocationIntegration.recalculationTrigger: When date changes (daily) OR when new revenue data arrives
